items.question: Adopt a single-path policy for SKILL.md management — the two-path drift is the #1 source of false 'shipped' claims.
items.context: Cowork path (Documents/Claude/Scheduled/) and MCP path (~/.claude/scheduled-tasks/) receive fixes independently. Multiple shipped claims in April 20-21 applied to one path but missed the active one. Pattern repeated even after being identified.
suggested_options: Deprecate Cowork path — make MCP path canonical, stop maintaining Cowork
Add sync step to every SKILL.md edit: always write to both paths atomically

Store idea names in a rolling 4-week blacklist JSON file instead
